texto: There's a big gaping hole in the EDM space for songwriting. It's one thing to learn how to be a great sound designer and become big just on sound design. Especially if you're in the dubstep category, it's like, how much fatter and more interesting can you make those drops.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Steve Aoki: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a sabedoria. O trecho “There's a big gaping hole in the EDM space for songwriting. It's one thing to learn how to be a g…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que sabedoria, great, space pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de space e you.

texto: Being a musician since I was a teen, Guitar Center is the staple. You need anything to create, it's there. You need a Guitar Center. You gotta give it homage. It's a tool shed, and without the tool shed, it's hard to create.
explicacao: Citação de Steve Aoki sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Being a musician since I was a teen, Guitar Center is the staple. You need anything to create, it…” articula reflexao, guitar, you em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como you e create.

texto: I always tell up-and-coming DJs you have to really love what you do and find that interest to drive you. It requires so much attention to detail, and it takes up a lot of your time. You hear a song, and there are so many little pieces that make that song work. It requires a lot of patience, diligence and resilience.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Steve Aoki sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. A afirmação “I always tell up-and-coming DJs you have to really love what you do and find that interest to dri…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a superacao, love, work, útil em momentos de trabalho e work.

You hear a song, and there are so many little pieces that make that song work. It requires a lot of patience, diligence and resilience.
